variables.name: SALUDSA_MCP_ENDPOINT
variables.description: Saludsa MCP REST API base URL. Tool endpoints reference this as {{env.SALUDSA_MCP_ENDPOINT}}/path

variables.name: SALUDSA_MCP_AUTH
variables.description: Authorization header value for MCP server (e.g. Basic <base64>)

variables.name: CC_STREAM_ID
variables.description: Kore.ai Contact Center stream ID for agent handoff

variables.name: CC_OPERATIONS_HOURS_URL
variables.description: Contact Center operations hours API base URL (legacy — prefer validateoutofhours MCP tool)

variables.name: CC_OPERATIONS_HOURS_TOKEN
variables.description: Auth token for CC operations hours API (legacy)
